description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the thefrenchdev/qc-testing-image Docker image with a mysql:5 service, caching pip files in ~/.cache/pip/ and node_modules in ~/node_modules, and defining variables CONTAINER_IMAGE, CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, MYSQL_DATABASE, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD. Include global before_script steps that run python -V, pip install -U -r requirements.txt, pip install -U --index-url https://test.pypi.org/simple/ pytexder, npm install -d, webpack, and ls -la. Define stages build, test, release, and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that executes ./test_extra/lint.sh and then runs pytest -n auto --tb native, with no artifacts or conditional rules.
